channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: July 4th Events Threatened by Heat Wave; Russia Strikes Ukraine's Capital
item.description: A heat wave endangers July 4th celebrations, while Russia attacks Kyiv, killing several.

item.title: Former USAID Head Grieves Closure, Hopes for Future
item.description: A former USAID administrator reflects on the agency's shutdown and the future of US aid.

item.title: Coffee first: The drink that fueled the American Revolution
item.description: Colonial Americans drank coffee long before the Boston Tea Party or the Revolutionary War. The establishments that serve...

item.title: Recently gave birth or expecting? Share your story and cost concerns
item.description: The costs of having a baby in the U.S. can be unpredictable. We want to hear your stories and questions about navigating the sys...
